heading: Temporary appointments to the Academy
label: 51316 Temporary appointments to the Academy
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Maritime Administrator may appoint any present employee of the United States Merchant Marine Academy non-appropriated fund instrumentality to a position on the General Schedule of comparable pay. Eligible personnel shall be engaged in work permissibly funded by annual appropriations, and such appointments to the Civil Service shall be without regard to competition, for a term not to exceed 2 years.
notes: References in TextThe General Schedule, referred to in text, is set out under , Government Organization and Employees.section 5332 of Title 5
